'''Wehttam''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Wehttam system/Legends|Wehttam system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. Wehttam was the [[Wehttam (group)|Wehttam]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. It was located in the [[Farlax sector/Legends|Farlax sector]].

==History==
Located on the [[Widek Bypass]], the planet joined the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] for protection from the [[Yevetha]]. The Wehttam and the [[Fian/Legends|Fian]] later betrayed the Yevetha to the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

{{Planet-stub}}
